rationale: The citing paper states it extends and challenges prior national-brand umbrella-branding findings on marketing-mix effectiveness, and the cited 2002 JMKR paper is directly about umbrella-brand spillovers from advertising and promotions across categories. This strong overlap in constructs/mechanisms (umbrella branding, cross-category spillovers, promotion effects) suggests likely substantive use as a foundational/comparison reference, not an obvious incidental mention.
